blurb_en: Kuaishou’s Kling AI signed as exclusive production partner on Minibots, an upcoming UK animated feature, announced at the Cannes Film Market on May 20. Evolutionary Films is producing, with Tony Bancroft (Mulan director) on character design and Michael Ferris (Terminator 3 screenwriter) writing the script. Kling becomes the exclusive global technological brand partner, providing platform access and a Creative Partnership Programme for the film’s international AI artist team. The production adopted a strict performance-first AI charter: all performances remain entirely human-created and actor-owned, with A-list voice talent already in discussions. This is the first formal embedding of a Chinese AI video platform in a mainstream Hollywood-adjacent animation pipeline — not a feature comparison, a business relationship. Runway went after Hollywood aesthetics. Kling is going after Hollywood legitimacy.
blurb_zh: 快手旗下可灵AI于5月20日在戛纳电影市场宣布，成为英国动画长片《Minibots》的独家全球技术品牌合作伙伴。Evolutionary Films担任制片，《花木兰》导演Tony Bancroft负责角色设计，《终结者3》编剧Michael Ferris操刀剧本。可灵提供平台使用权和创意合作项目，支持影片的国际AI艺术团队，但有一条硬规定：所有表演必须由真人完成，演员对其表演保有完整权利，A级配音演员已在洽谈中。这是中国AI视频平台首次正式进入好莱坞主流动画制作流程，不只是技术比较，而是商业合作关系。Runway追的是好莱坞的审美，可灵追的是好莱坞的认可。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Deadline and Variety both covering the Cannes Film Market announcement on May 20, 2026. Globe Newswire press release and IMDB News also corroborate. Tony Bancroft and Michael Ferris credentials verified.

blurb_en: A video of the SFO Museum's Women of Afrofuturism exhibition — open since May 17 at Harvey Milk Terminal 1 — circulated on the Bay Area subreddit in late May, drawing thousands of comments calling Nettrice Gaskins’ AI-assisted generative portraits ‘AI slop.’ Gaskins holds a PhD in digital media, teaches at Lesley University, and has spent her career working with generative systems — algorithms that make compositional decisions, not image generators that produce on-demand outputs. The show ran for weeks without comment; a 15-second phone video turned an academic’s life work into a content moderation debate. Critics conflated AI-assisted generative art with fully AI-generated imagery, a distinction the thread did not pause to consider. The artist responded publicly: the museum did not replace human artists with AI, multiple artists in the exhibition use no AI at all. The term ‘AI slop’ has been migrating all year from social media to editorial meetings to gallery boards; this week it arrived at an American airport museum.
blurb_zh: 2026年5月17日，旧金山国际机场哈维·米尔克1号航站1楼的《非洲未来主义女性》展览开幕，几周后一段视频在Reddit湾区频道疯传，数千条评论将Nettrice Gaskins的AI辅助生成艺术称为“AI垃圾”。Gaskins持数字媒体博士学位，执教于莱斯利大学，她的创作使用算法驱动的生成艺术——不是输入一句话就吐出图片的那种。展览安静挂着好几周，一段15秒的手机视频让学术生涯变成了内容审核争议。批评者将AI辅助艺术与完全AI生成的内容混为一谈——这个区别在帖子热度面前无人在意。艺术家回应：博物馆没有用AI替代艺术家，展览中多位艺术家根本没用AI。“AI垃圾”这个词今年一路从社交媒体渗进编辑室、走进画廊，这周落到了美国机场的博物馆。
verification_notes: KRON4 local TV report corroborated by Yahoo News. Artist Nettrice Gaskins Medium post confirms her response. SFO Museum press release confirms exhibition dates (May 17 through Sept 27, 2026). Exact viral date unclear but late May per context.

blurb_en: Freebeat, a San Francisco startup founded by Stanford alumni, launched what it calls the first real-time music video AI — uploading a song triggers a live WebRTC session that renders video frame-by-frame while the track plays. There is no render queue: the first frame arrives the moment playback begins, subsequent frames track the beat. The platform claims 90% lip sync accuracy across 100+ languages, built on a beat-paired training corpus assembled over five years while larger labs focused on general-purpose video generation. Freebeat has generated over 1 billion seconds of video across 1 million users in 200 countries since launch. Music Ally covered the story as a case study in building a domain-specific foundation model — the only major video AI that started by listening to music rather than watching it. For video creators: tools that understand audio are likely to reshape synchronized editing before tools that understand video do.
blurb_zh: 斯坦福校友创立的旧金山初创公司Freebeat于5月29日发布自称全球首款实时音乐视频AI——上传一首歌，AI边听边实时生成视频，第一帧随着播放开始同步出现。没有渲染队列：第一帧在播放的瞬间出现，后续帧跟着节拍走。平台宣称在100多种语言中实现约90%的口型同步准确率，基于一个历时五年积累的音乐-视觉配对训练语料库。自上线以来，Freebeat已在200多个国家为100万创作者生成超过10亿秒的视频内容。Music Ally将此次发布作为垂直基础模型的案例：唯一一个从一开始就真正懂音乐的视频AI。对视频创作者的信号：理解音频的AI工具可能比理解视觉的AI更早颠覆同步剪辑。
verification_notes: Music Ally (May 29) primary industry source. Send2Press newswire confirms launch. freebeat.ai website and Yahoo Canada article corroborate product description and user stats. CEO Bruce Chen identified as Stanford alumnus founder.

blurb_en: OpenAI announced on May 30 that GPT-4.5, the last model in the GPT-4 family to remain in ChatGPT, will be retired on June 27 — closing a commercial arc that began in March 2023 and ends with a changelog entry. The retirement is ChatGPT-only; GPT-4.5 remains accessible via API, keeping existing developer integrations running. GPT-4.5 launched in February 2026 as the company’s last emotional intelligence-focused model before attention shifted fully to reasoning and multimodal systems. TechRadar called it the end of an AI era: the GPT-4 family was the release that made AI a household subject; it leaves without a press conference. GPT-5.5 Instant is now the default. The upgrade path took three years.
blurb_zh: OpenAI于5月30日宣布，ChatGPT中最后一个GPT-4系列模型——GPT-4.5——将于6月27日退役，画上一条从2023年3月延续至2026年6月的商业弧线的句号。此次退役仅限于ChatGPT；API通道保持开放，现有开发者集成不受影响。GPT-4.5于2026年2月作为最后一款情感智能模型上线，付费用户可在模型设置中手动选择，直到日落。TechRadar称之为AI时代的终结：GPT-4系列是让AI成为家喻户晓词汇的那一版，最终以一条更新日志收尾。当前默认模型已切换为GPT-5.5 Instant。这条升级路走了三年。
verification_notes: TechRadar and Yahoo Tech cover the retirement announcement. OpenAI Help Center release notes confirm GPT-4.5 retirement date of June 27. OpenAI model release notes corroborate May 30 timing.

blurb_en: OpenAI launched Rosalind Biodefense on May 29 via an Axios exclusive, pairing GPT-Rosalind — its frontier life-sciences reasoning model — with vetted U.S. government partners and developers building pandemic preparedness and early detection tools. The program is named after Rosalind Franklin, whose X-ray diffraction images were critical to understanding DNA’s structure. Government access includes ‘security and accountability controls appropriate for advanced biological capabilities,’ an unusual phrase for a launch announcement. Covered use cases span epidemiological modeling, pathogen screening, non-pharmaceutical interventions, and medical countermeasure development. The same week, OpenAI published its Frontier Governance Framework, aligning safety documentation with the EU AI Act and California’s Transparency in Frontier AI Act. OpenAI is now in biodefense, consumer finance, enterprise productivity, and hardware. The AI company built a conglomerate while you were using it to write emails.
blurb_zh: OpenAI于5月29日通过Axios独家发布Rosalind Biodefense计划，将其生命科学推理模型GPT-Rosalind提供给经过审核的美国政府合作方和生物防御工具开发者。项目以Rosalind Franklin命名——这位化学家的X射线衍射图像对理解DNA结构至关重要。政府访问层附带“适用于高级生物能力的安全与问责控制”——在发布公告里出现这句话，耐人寻味。覆盖场景包括流行病学建模、病原体筛查、非药物干预和医学对策研发。同周，OpenAI还发布了《前沿治理框架》，回应欧盟AI法案和加州AI透明法。OpenAI现在涉足生物防御、消费金融、企业生产力和硬件。你还在用它写邮件的时候，它已经悄悄变成了一家综合集团。
verification_notes: Axios had an exclusive on the launch. OpenAI blog post at openai.com/index/strengthening-societal-resilience-with-rosalind-biodefense/ confirms all details. Multiple secondary sources corroborate.
